core.name: WooCommerce Core & Checkout Engineering
core.context: Architecting custom payment gateways, secure webhooks, transactional email pipelines, and high-performance checkout structures that scale under high concurrency.

core.name: WordPress Plugin Architecture
core.context: Over 8 years building commercial and open-source plugins. Deep expertise in WP Hooks, database tuning, security sanitization, and Gutenberg React block integrations.

modern.name: React / Next.js
modern.context: Primary framework suite. Building decoupled frontends using React Server Components, client state stores, and optimized asset delivery.

modern.name: TypeScript
modern.context: Strict type-safety across client and server modules. Defining interfaces, custom generics, and compilation checks to prevent production crashes.

modern.name: Tailwind CSS v4 & Astro
modern.context: Deploying zero-JS static sites with Astro. Styling modular layouts with Tailwind's fluid systems and theme tokens.

backend.name: PHP & Laravel
backend.context: Building MVC applications, API routes, queue pipelines, Eloquent models, and automated tests.

backend.name: Node.js & Express
backend.context: Creating clean REST API endpoints, routing logic, request validators, and background microservices.

backend.name: API Design (REST & Graph)
backend.context: Structuring predictable resource schemas, custom endpoints, and GraphQL resolvers for headless integrations.

cms.name: WordPress
cms.context: Extending themes, core overrides, custom post mappings, and database optimizations.

cms.name: Headless CMS Platforms
cms.context: Setting up content collections, API sync hooks, and layouts for Cockpit CMS, Strapi, and PocketBase.

infra.name: MySQL / PostgreSQL
infra.context: Schema optimizations, indexing strategy, locking issues, and raw query tuning.

infra.name: Git & CI/CD Pipelines
infra.context: Version control branching, GitHub Actions workflow tasks, automated checks, and deployments.

infra.name: Docker & Linux Servers
infra.context: Defining multi-stage Dockerfiles, compose setups, and administering Nginx gateways.

legacy.name: jQuery
legacy.context: Maintaining legacy plugin interactions, selector event maps, and browser DOM manipulations.

legacy.name: AJAX
legacy.context: Asynchronous form validation, raw XMLHttpRequests, and partial DOM swaps in legacy systems.

legacy.name: Bootstrap
legacy.context: Maintaining grid templates and styling variables on older client portals.
